plugin.name: Respell
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Run the su alias out of combat when protection good or inertial barrier drop

trigger.match: ^You no longer feel protected by the forces of shadow\.$
^You were the first to complete this quest!$

muclient.script:
-- ----- configuration -----
local READY_STATE = 3 -- char.status state: fully active, able to receive commands local COMBAT_STATE = 8 -- char.status state: in combat local DEBOUNCE = 0.5 -- seconds to wait after a drop before sending su, so two -- spells dropping together only trigger one su
-- ----- live state -----
local gNeedProt = false -- protection good needs to be (re)cast local gNeedBarrier = false -- inertial barrier needs to be (re)cast local gSpellupSent = false -- an "su" is in flight this out-of-combat period local gPending = false -- a debounced check is already scheduled local gInBCC = false -- inside Black Claw Crag; pause spellups local gOnGQ = false -- on a global quest; pause spellups local gManualOff = false -- manually turned off via "respell off" local gState = 0 local gPrevState = 0
-- ----- helpers -----
local function needsSpellup () return gNeedProt or gNeedBarrier end
local function isPaused () return gInBCC or gOnGQ or gManualOff end
-- Run the "su" alias if we are out of combat and something still needs casting. -- force = true ignores the in-flight guard (used when we just left combat, so an -- interrupted spellup gets retried until both spells are back). local function trySpellup (force) if not needsSpellup () then return end if isPaused () then return end if gState ~= READY_STATE then return end if gSpellupSent and not force then return end
gSpellupSent = true ColourNote ("dodgerblue", "", "[Respell] out of combat - running su") Execute ("su") end
-- Wait a moment after a drop before acting, so two spells dropping at once only -- queue a single su. Only one check is ever scheduled at a time. local function scheduleSpellup () if gPending then return end gPending = true if gState ~= READY_STATE then ColourNote ("silver", "", "[Respell] spell dropped - will su when out of combat") end DoAfterSpecial (DEBOUNCE, "Respell_DoCheck ()", sendto.script) end
-- Global so the debounce timer can call it. function Respell_DoCheck () gPending = false trySpellup (false) end
-- ----- GMCP capture (telnet option 201) -----
function OnPluginTelnetSubnegotiation (theType, data) if theType ~= 201 then return end
local message = string.match (data, "^([%w%.%-_]+)") if not message then return end
if string.lower (message) == "char.status" then local st = string.match (data, '"state"%s*:%s*(%d+)') if st then gPrevState = gState gState = tonumber (st)
if gState == READY_STATE and gPrevState == COMBAT_STATE then -- Just left combat: retry any spellup that was interrupted. gSpellupSent = false trySpellup (true) elseif gState == READY_STATE then trySpellup (false) end end end end
-- ----- trigger callbacks -----
function onProtDrop (name, line, wildcards) gNeedProt = true scheduleSpellup () end
function onBarrierDrop (name, line, wildcards) gNeedBarrier = true scheduleSpellup () end
function onProtCast (name, line, wildcards) gNeedProt = false if not needsSpellup () then gSpellupSent = false end end
function onBarrierCast (name, line, wildcards) gNeedBarrier = false if not needsSpellup () then gSpellupSent = false end end
function onBCCStart (name, line, wildcards) if not gInBCC then gInBCC = true ColourNote ("silver", "", "[Respell] paused - inside Black Claw Crag") end end
function onBCCEnd (name, line, wildcards) if gInBCC then gInBCC = false ColourNote ("silver", "", "[Respell] resumed - left Black Claw Crag") -- Catch up if a spell dropped while inside. gSpellupSent = false trySpellup (true) end end
function onGQJoin (name, line, wildcards) if not gOnGQ then gOnGQ = true ColourNote ("silver", "", "[Respell] paused - on a global quest") end end
function onGQEnd (name, line, wildcards) if gOnGQ then gOnGQ = false ColourNote ("silver", "", "[Respell] resumed - global quest over") -- Catch up if a spell dropped during the GQ. gSpellupSent = false trySpellup (true) end end
-- ----- alias callbacks -----
function aliasRespellToggle (name, line, wildcards) if wildcards [1] == "off" then gManualOff = true ColourNote ("orange", "", "[Respell] manually OFF") else gManualOff = false ColourNote ("orange", "", "[Respell] manually ON") -- Catch up if a spell dropped while off. gSpellupSent = false trySpellup (true) end end
-- ----- lifecycle -----
function OnPluginInstall () if IsConnected () then Send ("protocols gmcp sendstatus") end end
function OnPluginEnable () OnPluginInstall () end
